positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric representation of a celestial body and flowing nature element. The composition features interlocking mandalas of deep indigo and burnt orange, forming a central, striking motif. The style is highly detailed neo-art deco combined with modern sacred geometry, resulting in crisp silhouettes and strong, clean edges. The background is a solid, dark midnight blue, ensuring maximum contrast for screen printing. The overall feeling is mystical, balanced, and sophisticated, designed for full-chest apparel placement.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, graffiti, low resolution, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, grainy, washed out, photorealistic, gradients
